description: A humid contrast case for stronger or deeper shallow-cumulus behavior.
physical_question: How does additional low-level moisture change cloud timing, depth, updrafts, and cloud water?
learning_goals: Compare humid behavior against the baseline.
Inspect stronger cloud-water and updraft signals without treating preview as truth.
intended_behavior: A moister contrast with potentially earlier or deeper cloud development.
expected_behavior: Clouds may form earlier, grow deeper, or show stronger cloud-water signals.

controls.label: Low-level humidity
controls.description: Lower-atmosphere moisture relative to the baseline.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should increase low-level sounding moisture.

controls.label: Surface heating
controls.description: Heating strength available to grow thermals.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should adjust idealized heating/flux forcing.

expected_diagnostics.first_cloud_time: record possibly earlier first cloud time
expected_diagnostics.cloud_water_summary: summarize stronger cloud-water evolution if present
expected_diagnostics.rain_onset: record if present, but warm rain has a separate scenario
notes: Humid vigorous behavior is subject to CM1 validation.

cm1_template.mapping_notes: Placeholder mapping until local CM1 validation.

limitations: Humid behavior requires local/manual CM1 validation.
